call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Oh, hi. I'm alright. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: Actually, I was thinking of using it for a down payment on a car. 
Agent: Perfect! That works great. The terms are very flexible. We have options from 24 to 60 months. What kind of monthly payment are you comfortable with? 
Eleanor: I'd like to keep it under $200 a month, if possible. 
Agent: Let me see… Okay, with a 60-month term, your monthly payment would be around $198. Does that sound good? We can also discuss the small origination fee, it's just 1% of the loan amount. 
Eleanor: One percent? Okay. That's…reasonable. 
Agent: Excellent. So, to finalize everything, I just need to verify a few details. Can you confirm your address is still… Denver, Colorado? 
Eleanor: Yes, that's correct. 
Agent: Wonderful. And your employment is still with… Apex Corp? 
Eleanor: Yes. 
Agent: Fantastic. Okay, Eleanor, congratulations! Your loan is approved. We'll send over the documents for you to sign electronically. You should receive them within the hour. 
Eleanor: Great, thank you so much!

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we acquired your information through… uh… a marketing partner. We're offering a low introductory rate. We can pre-approve you for a $2500 Signature Credit Card at 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. What's the catch? 
Agent: There's no catch, sir. It's just a limited-time offer. 
Robert: No, thank you. I'm not interested. And please, take my number off your list. 
Agent: Okay, sir. Have a good day.

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a referral from GreenTech Solutions. They mentioned you might be interested in a personal loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, Mark from GreenTech mentioned something. I'm thinking about renovating my kitchen. 
Agent: That's fantastic! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. We have several term options, but what kind of monthly payment are you aiming for? 
Jessica: I'm not sure, honestly. I haven't really looked into it. I'm kinda busy. 
Agent: No problem at all. We can work through it together. A 60-month term would put you around $330 a month. There's a small 1.5% origination fee, just to cover processing costs. 
Jessica: Hmm, 1.5%… that's… okay. What if I wanted to pay it off faster? 
Agent: Absolutely! There's no penalty for early repayment. You can pay it off as quickly as you like. We also offer a bi-weekly payment option, which can save you on interest. 
Jessica: That sounds good. What's the APR, exactly? 
Agent: The APR is 13.2%, factoring in the origination fee. 
Jessica: Okay. And what documents do I need to provide? 
Agent: Just a copy of your driver's license and your most recent bank statement. We can upload them securely through our online portal. 
Jessica: Alright, sounds good. Let's do it. 
Agent: Excellent! I'm happy to hear that. Let's get started with the application process…

Agent: Hello, Mr. Davis? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. We're offering a fantastic rewards program on our Signature Credit Card. 
Michael: (Interrupting) You guys called me yesterday! I told you I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We are pre-approving you for a $5000 Signature Credit Card at 17.99%. 
Michael: 17.99?! Are you kidding me? This is ridiculous! I want to be removed from your call list immediately! 
Agent: Sir, I can… 
(Click - call disconnected)

Agent: Good afternoon, Mrs. Rodriguez. This is Alex calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently submitted an application for a personal loan online. 
Patricia: Oh, yes, dear. I did. I'm a little confused about the whole process, to be honest. Could you repeat that? 
Agent: Absolutely. We are pre-approving you for an $8,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 14.5%. This could help with, perhaps, some unexpected expenses? 
Patricia: Well, my grandson needs some help with college tuition. It's quite a bit. 
Agent: That's wonderful of you to help him. We can definitely assist with that. The loan terms are flexible, ranging from 24 to 72 months. What monthly payment would be comfortable for you? 
Patricia: Oh, I don't know. I'm not very good with numbers. 
Agent: No problem at all. Let's look at a 60-month term. That would be around $175 a month. There's a 2% origination fee, which covers the cost of setting up the loan. 
Patricia: Two percent… hmm. That's… alright, I suppose. 
Agent: It is. And you can always pay it off early without any penalties. We also offer a convenient online portal where you can manage your payments. 
Patricia: Oh, that sounds good. I'm not very tech-savvy, but I can try. 
Agent: We have excellent customer support to help you with anything you need. Would you like me to send you the loan agreement to review? 
Patricia: Yes, please. That would be very helpful. 
Agent: Wonderful. I'll send it over right away. And feel free to call back if you have any questions.
